Section 9 Faculty members with administrative designations required to report to the station on semestral break and midyear break shall be entitled to earn sick/vacation leave credit(s). The faculty member assigned to the aforementioned designation shall formally request approval for the entitlement to earn sick and vacation leave credits. This request shall be duly noted by the immediate supervisor(s) and requires final approval from the University President.

Section 10 Should the designation be revoked for reasonable ground(s), the appointing authority shall communicate and furnish the immediate supervisor(s) and the Human Resource Management Officer a copy of the revocation order for the conversion of the sick/vacation credits to service credits.

Section 11 No faculty member shall be designated to a nonseasonal/occasional administrative position within/during the regular duration of classes. The requesting party shall seek the approval of the designating authority and the concurrence of the faculty at least a month before the

Section 9 Faculty members with administrative designations required to report to the station on semestral break and midyear break shall be entitled to earn sick/vacation leave credit(s). The faculty member assigned to the aforementioned designation shall formally request approval for the entitlement to earn sick and vacation leave credits. This request shall be duly noted by the immediate supervisor(s) and requires final approval from the University President.

Section 10 Should the designation be revoked for reasonable ground(s), the appointing authority shall communicate and furnish the immediate supervisor(s) and the Human Resource Management Officer a copy of the revocation order for the conversion of the sick/vacation credits to service credits.

Section 11 No faculty member shall be designated to a nonseasonal/occasional administrative position within/during the regular duration of classes. The requesting party shall seek the approval of the designating authority and the concurrence of the faculty at least a month before the
qa_pairs.question: What positions can faculty members with administrative designations request approval for?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty members with administrative designations can request approval for sick/vacation leave credits, according to Section 9 of the policy.

This request shall be duly noted by the immediate supervisor(s) and requires final approval from the University President.

Section 10 Should the designation be revoked for reasonable ground(s), the appointing authority shall communicate and furnish the immediate supervisor(s) and the Human Resource Management Officer a copy of the revocation order for the conversion of the sick/vacation credits to service credits.

Section 11 No faculty member shall be designated to a nonseasonal/occasional administrative position within/during the regular duration of classes. The requesting party shall seek the approval of the designating authority and the concurrence of the faculty at least a month before the
qa_pairs.question: Can a faculty member with an administrative designation request approval for leave credits retroactively?
qa_pairs.answer: No, according to Section 9.

qa_pairs.question: How many times can a faculty member with an administrative designation request approval for leave credits in a year?
